landing.selectRobotFirst: Select or create a robot on the Landing page first.
landing.robotMissingCalibration: {{name}} is missing a calibration. Configure it before recording.
landing.enterDatasetDetails: Please enter a dataset name and task description.
landing.cameraStreamsReleased: Camera streams released successfully. Starting recording…
landing.searchCreateDataset: Search, type a new name, or org/name…
landing.noDatasetsYet: No datasets yet. Type a name to create one.
landing.taskPlaceholder: e.g., pick up the red block and place it on the blue square

robot.selectOrCreate: Select a robot or type a new name
robot.noneYet: No robots yet. Type a name to create one.
robot.deleteConfigDescription: This deletes the robot config file from disk. Calibration files are not removed. This cannot be undone.
robot.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to the backend server.
robot.alreadyExistsDescription: A robot named "{{name}}" already exists. Pick it from the dropdown or choose a different name.

auth.cliExplanation: Uploads, training, and replay-from-Hub require a logged-in HF CLI. Run this in a terminal:
auth.cloudTrainingRequired: Hugging Face access required for cloud training
auth.tokenInstructionsAfter: with Write access (so trained policies can upload to your account), then paste it below.
auth.showLoginInstructions: Hugging Face not configured — show login instructions

teleoperation.title: Teleoperation
teleoperation.alreadyOpen: The app is already open in another tab
teleoperation.oneTabOnly: Only one tab can control the robot at a time. Switch back to the original tab, or take over here — the other tab will lock.
teleoperation.retryCameraFeeds: Retry camera feeds (e.g. after reconnecting a camera)
teleoperation.noConfiguredCameras: No cameras configured for this robot. Add them during calibration to see live feeds here.
teleoperation.cameraWatchHint: Turn on to watch your cameras while you teleoperate.
teleoperation.commandPlaceholder: Tell the robot what to do…

calibration.title: Device Calibration
calibration.openFromRobot: Open Calibration from a robot's gear icon on the Landing page. Each robot has its own calibration; running this page directly is not supported.
calibration.setPortFirst: Set the device's serial port before starting.
calibration.camerasDisabledDescription: Turn cameras on to scan for connected devices and preview them. The browser may briefly open a camera to read device labels, and configured cameras stay active while previews are visible; your browser will ask for camera permission. Nothing is recorded.
calibration.cameraPermission: You'll be asked to grant camera access.
calibration.moveEachJoint: Move EACH joint through its full range of motion.
calibration.connectingDescription: Connecting to the device. Please ensure it's connected.
calibration.motorDiscontinuityDescription: Start calibration with the robot in a middle position — all joints in the middle of their ranges. See the calibration demo below for the correct starting pose.

recording.noCameras: No cameras configured. Add a camera to get started.
recording.selectCameraAndName: Please select a camera and provide a name.
recording.cameraAlreadyAddedDescription: This camera is already in the configuration.
recording.cameraAddedDescription: {{name}} has been added to the configuration.
recording.cameraRemovedDescription: Camera has been removed from the configuration.
recording.backendHint: Overriding the backend can reorder camera indices on macOS.
recording.startFromMain: Please start recording from the main page.
recording.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to the backend server.
recording.stopDescription: The current recording will end. You can upload the saved dataset on the next page.
recording.configureDescription: Pick a configured robot and dataset parameters for recording.
recording.selectRobotBeforeRecording: Select and configure a robot on the Landing page before recording.
recording.datasetNameHint: Letters, numbers, ., _ and - only — other characters become _.
recording.loginForOwner: Log in to Hugging Face to set the repository owner.
recording.streamingEncodingHint: Encodes frames in real time during capture so each episode saves almost instantly. Uncheck to fall back to the slower PNG-then-encode flow.
recording.stopConfirmDescription: Saved episodes are kept. The session will end and you'll be taken to the upload page.
recording.taskPlaceholder: e.g., pick up the red block and place it on the blue square

training.title: Training
training.anotherRunning: Another local training is already running
training.loginForCloud: Log in to Hugging Face to use cloud compute
training.datasetRepositoryHint: Hugging Face Hub dataset repository ID
training.costHint: Cost shown is per running hour. Final policy uploads to your HF account when training completes.
training.noCheckpointsYet: No checkpoints yet — wait for the first save.
training.deleteRunQuestion: Delete this run? This wipes the output directory.
training.installCopyManually: Select the command and copy manually.
training.extraDescriptionAfter: package, which isn't installed in this environment. Install it to enable the Training page.
training.policyDescription: Training a {{policy}} policy requires the {{package}} package (installed via {{target}}), which is not installed in this environment yet. Install it to train this policy.
training.wandbInstallDescription: Install the wandb package to enable W&B logging.
training.wandbDescriptionAfter: package, which isn't installed in this environment. Install it to log this run to W&B.

inference.title: Inference
inference.stopDescription: The follower will hold its current pose. You can launch another run from the job tile.
inference.configureDescription: Pick a checkpoint and confirm hardware. The selected policy will drive the follower autonomously for the configured duration.
inference.selectRobotFirst: Select and configure a robot on the Landing page first.
inference.robotMissingCalibration: {{name}} is missing a calibration. Configure it before running inference.
inference.noCheckpoints: No checkpoints available for this job yet.
inference.cameraBindingHint: Bind a physical camera to each name the policy was trained with. Resolution comes from the checkpoint.
inference.taskPlaceholder: e.g., pick up the red block

upload.uploadedDescription: Your dataset has been uploaded to Hugging Face Hub and is now available for training and sharing.
upload.completeRecordingFirst: Please complete a recording session first.
upload.incompleteInfo: Could not load complete dataset information. Using session data.
upload.usingSessionData: Could not connect to backend. Using session data.
upload.uploadFailedDescription: Failed to upload dataset to Hugging Face Hub.
upload.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to the backend server.
upload.savedLocally: Dataset saved locally. You can upload it manually later.
upload.tagsHint: Tags help others discover your dataset on Hugging Face Hub
upload.privateHint: Only you will be able to access this dataset
upload.publicHint: Dataset will be publicly accessible on Hugging Face Hub
upload.aboutUpload1: Your dataset will be uploaded to Hugging Face Hub for sharing and collaboration
upload.aboutUpload2: You need to be logged in to Hugging Face CLI on the server
upload.aboutUpload3: Uploaded datasets can be used for training models and sharing with the community
upload.aboutUpload4: You can always upload manually later using the Hugging Face CLI
upload.deleteDescription: This permanently removes {{name}} from your local cache. This action cannot be undone.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.noLocalMatch: No local jobs match your search.
jobs.noActiveLocal: No active local jobs. Start one from the Training page.
jobs.signInForCloud: Sign in with Hugging Face to see your cloud jobs.
jobs.noOnlineMatch: No online jobs match your search.
jobs.importDescription: Point at a local directory or a Hugging Face repo. It appears as a job you can run inference on.
jobs.modelSource: Local path or Hugging Face repo id
jobs.removeImportedQuestion: Remove this imported model? The source files are left untouched.
jobs.deleteRunQuestion: Delete this run? This wipes the output directory.

portDetection.title: Port Detection
portDetection.description: Detect the USB port for your {{robotType}} arm
portDetection.unplugDescription: Disconnect the {{robotType}} robot arm from USB. The port will be detected automatically.

urdf.releaseToUpload: Release to upload your robot model
urdf.defaultModelDescription: The default ARM100 robot model is now displayed.
urdf.uploadFolder: Please upload a folder containing a .urdf file.

usage.title: Get Started
usage.description: The app runs on your machine. Click the command to copy it, then paste it in a terminal:
usage.afterRunning: After running, your browser will open the local app.

update.copyManually: Select and copy the command manually.
update.getLatest: Update to get the latest fixes and features 🤗.
